age_range.evidence: Although ages ranged from 17 to 39, the majority of participants (78%) fell between the ages of 18 and 22 (inclusive).

countries.evidence: Undergraduate students enrolled in communication courses at a large-sized southeastern university were recruited for this study (N = 300).

fieldwork_year.evidence: Data were collected during both spring and fall semesters of 2018.

gender_split.evidence: Of the participants, 31% were male and 68% were female.

sample_size.evidence: Undergraduate students enrolled in communication courses at a large-sized southeastern university were recruited for this study (N = 300).
